title: Include a board details section in the excel export options

posts.author: Enge (Engela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can you please create an option to include a section about the details of the board in the excel export option?

The exported excel sheet should
include a section indicating the:
-Creation date
-Board owner
-Export date
